action.reasoning: Observation: ViT-B/16 AugReg trained for 5 epochs (lr=0.01, AdamW, AMP) achieved 16.23% Quickdraw accuracy (up from 12.27% ResNet). Validation accuracy 71.0% and loss 1.06 show underfitting and room to improve. Analysis: ViT is clearly better; the high lr may be suboptimal for full-model fine-tuning; longer training with AdamW and lower lr (5e-5) should improve generalization. Decision: Run 30 epochs with lr=5e-5, weight_decay=0.01, batch_size=256 effective, AMP, CosineAnnealingLR. Submit eval immediately to measure maximum improvement. Expected ~100 min, well within budget.
